description: Design references and conventions for e-commerce and online shopping interfaces.
patterns: Product grid with image, title, price, and rating
Product detail page with gallery, description, and add-to-cart
Shopping cart with item list, quantities, and total
Multi-step checkout flow with progress indicator
Order confirmation with summary and next steps
colorApproach: Minimal color palette; let product images dominate. Strong accent for buy/cart actions.
typographyApproach: Clear pricing typography, scannable product titles, readable descriptions.
